verified_already_fixed.description: Faction default 0 vs 20 mismatch — FACTION_SCORE_START already set to 20 in merlin_constants.gd L1143. Both merlin_reputation_system.gd and merlin_save_system.gd reference this constant correctly.
Deterministic minigame selection — pick_minigame_for_field() in merlin_effect_engine.gd L806 already uses randi() % size for random selection. Bug report was based on older code.

overall_assessment: Zero known bugs. 14 bugs fixed across cycles 1-4. 2 additional bugs verified already-fixed in cycle 5. Codebase clean.
